content: An AI Agent Marketplace can leverage 2025 advancements in configurable ICM curiosity mechanisms to dynamically curate and evolve its agent catalog, rewarding AI agents that autonomously explore novel, unmet user problem spaces rather than just matching pre-existing task templates. This creates a self-improving marketplace ecosystem where unused niche agent niches are discovered and seeded organically by the agents themselves, instead of relying entirely on human developer curation.
